name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cucumber lengthwise and remove seeds.
2. Dice the cucumber.
3. Add remaining ingredients to a bowl.
4. Mix thoroughly and chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.
This recipe serves 10. Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE SERVING CHO: 6g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 39. For low sodium diets, omit salt.
